description: Normalized shapes for abtest adapter capabilities. Mirrors adapters/README.md:191-210. `list_experiments` is intentionally lenient (additionalProperties: true) because different abtest tools decorate summary rows with different extras (visitors, ci bounds, p, description). Everything else is strict so key renames fail loudly.

_iso_8601.description: ISO-8601 timestamp (UTC Z or explicit offset). Permits fractional seconds.

_status.description: Canonical experiment status. Keep this list in sync with adapters/README.md:199.

push_variant.description: Return of push_variant(slug, patch_path, description, allocation_pct). Confirms the experiment was created at the requested allocation. `allocation_pct` is an optional echo of the caller-supplied integer percentage so validate-adapter.md can assert round-trip.

get_experiment.description: Return of get_experiment(experiment_id). Full detail including stats once the tool has enough traffic. ended_at is null while running.

list_experiments.description: Return of list_experiments(). Array of summary rows. Lenient: additionalProperties allowed because tools decorate summaries with different extras.

promote.description: Return of promote(experiment_id, allocation). Confirms the new allocation after manual ramp. allocation is in [0,1].

archive.description: Return of archive(experiment_id). Confirms the experiment was stopped/archived. Status must transition to `stopped`.
